title: GenderPluginCompat
description: Makes a plugin to add server-side compatibility with Wildfire's GenderMod
body:
# GenderPluginCompat

With this plugin, you can use Wildfire's GenderMod on the server without the need for Global Syncing.

Features:
- Behaviour match with Wildfire's GenderMod server side behaviour
- Does not send data to players out of range

Currently only 1.21.1 to 1.21.5 to supported, however it may work on older versions. Here be dragons!

Make sure to check out [Wildfire's GenderMod](https://modrinth.com/mod/female-gender)!
